creator: scheidell@FreeBSD.org
text:
There is no patch attached to this PR, only a debug dump.  I see nothing 
in there that indicates a fix for this issue.

if you have questions about how to generate a patch, join and ask a 
question at freebsd-ports@ mailing list.


-- 
Michael Scheidell, CTO
 >*| * SECNAP Network Security Corporation
